days_ago.description: Date n days in the past

days_from_now.description: Date n days in the future

weeks_ago.description: Date n weeks in the past

weeks_from_now.description: Date n weeks in the future

months_ago.description: Date n months in the past

months_from_now.description: Date n months in the future

completed_cycles.description: Cycles whose end date has passed

upcoming_cycles.description: Cycles whose start date is in the future

is_overdue.description: Due date is past AND state is open

is_top_level.description: Not a sub-work item(has no parent)

is_sub_work_item.description: Is a sub-work item(has a parent)

has_children.description: Has at least one sub-work item

has_start_and_due_dates.description: Has both start and due dates

linked_to.description: Work items related to the given work item

blocked_by.description: Work items blocked by the given work item

blocks.description: Work items that block the given work item

child_of.description: Sub-work items of the given work item

parent_of.description: Parent work item of the given work item

duplicate_of.description: Work items marked as duplicates of the given work item

was_ever.description: Field was ever set to this value

was.description: Field was previously this value (changed away from)

changed_from.description: Field was changed from this value

changed_to.description: Field was changed to this value

updated_by.description: Work item updated by this user

commented_by.description: Work item commented by this user

was_assigned_to.description: Work item was assigned to this user

changed_to_after.description: Field changed to this value after this date

changed_to_before.description: Field changed to this value before this date

pql.placeholder: Type a query and press "ENTER" to filter...
pql.error: Error submitting query. Please check and try again.
